data.en: Do you have a ping-pong bat?
data.hint: Question format with 'Do' / 使用 'Do' 引导的一般疑问句

data.en: I need new running shoes.
data.hint: Adjective + noun / 形容词修饰名词

data.en: We practice on an exercise mat.
data.hint: Preposition 'on' for flat surfaces / 介词 'on' 用于平面

data.en: He plays baseball with a glove.
data.hint: Preposition 'with' for tools/equipment / 介词 'with' 表示使用工具

data.en: Do you like to jump rope?
data.hint: Like to + verb / 喜欢做某事 (like to do)

data.en: I often play badminton with my friends.
data.cn: 我经常和朋友打羽毛球。
data.hint: Adverb 'often' goes before main verb / 频度副词 'often' 在实义动词前

data.en: She has a new tennis racket.
data.hint: Use 'has' for third-person singular / 第三人称单数使用 'has'

data.en: They play volleyball in the summer.
data.hint: Preposition 'in' for seasons / 季节前用介词 'in'

data.en: I like skateboarding very much.
data.hint: Noun form of the sport / 运动的名词形式

data.en: Some tricks are difficult to do.
data.hint: Adjective + to do / 形容词 + to do 结构

data.en: How often do you play football?
data.hint: Question word for frequency / 询问频率的疑问词组

data.en: I play it three times a week.
data.hint: Frequency phrase at the end / 频率短语放在句末

data.en: She hardly ever plays tennis.
data.hint: Hardly ever = almost never / hardly ever 表示几乎从不

data.en: We usually jog in the park.
data.cn: 我们通常在公园里慢跑。
data.hint: Adverb 'usually' before main verb / 'usually' 放在实义动词前

data.en: I seldom go jogging in the morning.
data.hint: Seldom = rarely / seldom 表示很少

data.en: They practice twice a month.
data.hint: Twice = two times / twice 表示两次

data.en: I am sometimes full of energy.
data.hint: Adverb 'sometimes' after 'be' verb / 频度副词放在be动词之后
accept: I am full of energy sometimes.
Sometimes I am full of energy.

data.en: He never plays computer games.
data.hint: Third-person singular verb 'plays' / 第三人称单数谓语动词加s

data.en: I try to exercise every day.
data.hint: Try to + verb / try to 表示尽量做某事

data.en: Once you succeed, you feel great.
data.cn: 一旦你成功了，你会感觉很棒。
data.hint: Once = as soon as / once 在这里表示“一旦”

data.en: Whose baseball glove is this?
data.hint: Question word for possession / 询问物品归属的疑问词

data.en: Is this tennis racket yours?
data.hint: Possessive pronoun 'yours' / 名词性物主代词 yours

data.en: No, it's not mine.
data.hint: Possessive pronoun 'mine' / 名词性物主代词 mine

data.en: I think it is hers.
data.hint: Possessive pronoun 'hers' / 名词性物主代词 hers

data.en: Their skateboards are really cool.
data.hint: Possessive adjective 'Their' / 形容词性物主代词 Their

data.en: I think ours is the best.
data.cn: 我认为我们的是最好的。
data.hint: Possessive pronoun 'ours' / 名词性物主代词 ours

data.en: Does this T-shirt belong to you?
data.hint: Belong to + object pronoun / belong to 后接宾格

data.en: His bat has his name on it.
data.cn: 他的球拍上有他的名字。
data.hint: 'His' can be an adjective or pronoun / his 既是形容词性也是名词性物主代词

data.en: Those running shoes are theirs.
data.hint: Possessive pronoun 'theirs' / 名词性物主代词 theirs

data.en: Are these our baseballs?
data.hint: Plural demonstrative 'these' / 复数指示代词 these

data.en: My goal is to be really fit.
data.cn: 我的目标是变得非常健康。
data.hint: Infinitive as subject complement / 不定式作表语

data.en: I use an exercise app to work out.
data.cn: 我使用运动软件来锻炼。
data.hint: Infinitive of purpose / 动词不定式表目的

data.en: We work as a team on the field.
data.cn: 我们在赛场上作为一个团队合作。
data.hint: Work as = act as / work as 作为一个...合作

data.en: The app shows my daily progress.
data.cn: 这款应用会显示我每天的进度。
data.hint: Uncountable noun 'progress' / 不可数名词 progress

data.en: It keeps us fit and healthy.
data.cn: 它让我们保持强壮且健康。
data.hint: Keep + object + adjective / keep + 宾语 + 形容词

data.en: Baseball builds team spirit.
data.hint: Third-person singular verb / 第三人称单数动词加s

data.en: We win or lose as a team.
data.cn: 我们作为一个团队共赢共输。
data.hint: Base verbs connected by 'or' / 由 'or' 连接的原形动词

data.en: I jog and do sit-ups every day.
data.cn: 我每天慢跑和做仰卧起坐。
data.hint: Do sit-ups / do + 运动项目(仰卧起坐)

data.en: We encourage one another.
data.hint: One another = each other / 互相

data.en: Practice makes perfect.
data.hint: Common English proverb / 常见英语谚语

data.en: Exercise is good for our body.
data.cn: 锻炼对我们的身体有好处。
data.hint: Be good for = beneficial / be good for 对...有益

data.en: Our brain gets more oxygen.
data.cn: 我们的头脑获得了更多氧气。
data.hint: Comparative 'more' / 比较级 'more'

data.en: It helps our memory improve.
data.cn: 它有助于改善我们的记忆力。
data.hint: Help somebody do something / help 宾语 + 动词原形
accept: It helps our memory to improve.

data.en: These chemicals relax our body.
data.cn: 这些化学物质能放松我们的身体。
data.hint: Plural subject takes base verb / 复数主语用动词原形

data.en: Health is wealth.
data.hint: Uncountable abstract nouns / 不可数抽象名词

data.en: Exercise develops our muscles.
data.cn: 锻炼能发达我们的肌肉。
data.hint: Third-person singular 'develops' / 第三人称单数动词

data.en: Being overweight puts stress on our body.
data.cn: 超重会给我们的身体带来压力。
data.hint: Gerund subject 'Being' / 动名词作主语

data.en: Our heart beats faster during exercise.
data.cn: 运动时我们的心跳加快。
data.hint: Comparative adverb 'faster' / 比较级副词 'faster'

data.en: Try to make exercise a part of your life.
data.cn: 试着把运动变成生活的一部分。
data.hint: Make A B = make A become B / 使A成为B

data.en: The more you exercise, the healthier you become.
data.cn: 你锻炼得越多，你就越健康。
data.hint: The more..., the more... structure / 越...就越...结构
